name: HerSilence

sheet.name: HerSilence
sheet.background_story:
Detriti was a god most rare,
A skeleton with bones so bare,
She ruled with power and might,
But one day, her reign took flight.

HerSilence, a holy knight,
Threw a rock with all his might,
And struck Detriti dead,
Leaving her bones to lay in bed.

The people cheered and celebrated,
No longer were they berated,
By the cruel and ruthless god,
They were finally free from the sod.

So let this be a lesson to all,
Be careful who you call,
A god, for even they can fall,
To the might of a rock, so small.
